Package index

Bars

Functions for vertical, horizontal, diverging, grouped, and edge bar charts.

wjp_bars() experimental
Plot a Bar Chart following WJP style guidelines
wjp_divbars() experimental
Plot a Diverging Horizontal Bar Chart following WJP style guidelines
wjp_groupbars() experimental
Plot a Grouped Stacked Bar Chart following WJP style guidelines
wjp_edgebars() experimental
Plot a Horizontal Edgebars Chart following WJP style guidelines

Dots and Lines

Functions for comparing points, trends, slopes, changes, and lollipops.

wjp_dots() experimental
Plot a Dots Chart following WJP style guidelines
wjp_lines() experimental
Plot a Line Chart following WJP style guidelines
wjp_slope() experimental
Plot a Slope Chart following WJP style guidelines
wjp_dumbbells() experimental
Plot a Dumbbell Chart following WJP style guidelines
wjp_lollipops() experimental
Plot a Lollipop Chart following WJP style guidelines

Radial and Special

Functions for radial charts, rose charts, and gauges.

wjp_radar() experimental
Plot a Radar Chart following WJP style guidelines
wjp_rose() experimental
Plot a Rose Chart following WJP style guidelines
wjp_gauge() experimental
Plot a Gauge Chart following WJP style guidelines

Validation, Analysis, and Styling

Support tools for validating data, checking dependencies, analyzing differences, and applying WJP styling.

wjp_check_data()
Validate Data Structure for WJPr Charts
wjp_check_deps()
Check WJPr Dependencies
diffmeans()
Difference of Means Analysis
wjp_fonts()
Load WJP Fonts
WJP_theme()
WJP ggplot2 Theme

Data

Datasets included in the package.

gpp
GPP Sample Data
roli
Rule of Law Index Historical Data

On this page
